ddls:
CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender" TEXT /* Sender of the message (up to 35 characters) */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the message (up to 35 characters) */,
  "prep_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the message was prepared */,
  "sent_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the message was sent */,
  "message_id_num" TEXT /* Identification number for the message (up to 35 characters) */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of the message (up to 6 characters) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the message (up to 100 characters) */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the message */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the message (e.g., Draft, Sent, Delivered, Read) (up to 10 characters) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the message (e.g., Low, Medium, High) (up to 10 characters) */,
  "attachment_count" INTEGER /* Number of attachments in the message */,
  "read_receipt_required" INTEGER /* Whether a read receipt is required */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* The rule ID associated with the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_message_type FOREIGN KEY ("message_type") REFERENCES message_types ("type_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES message_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_types" (
  "type_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the message type (up to 6 characters) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the message type */,
  "default_priority" TEXT /* Default priority level for messages of this type (e.g., Low, Medium, High) (up to 10 characters) */,
  "default_status" TEXT /* Default status for messages of this type (e.g., Draft, Sent, Delivered, Read) (up to 10 characters) */,
  "notification_required" INTEGER /* Whether notifications are required for messages of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "rule_code" TEXT /* Code for the rule (up to 6 characters) */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the rule (e.g., Low, Medium, High) (up to 10 characters) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the rule is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)
